chapter_title.en: Time of reappearance of the Imam (a.s)

text: 416- الفضل بن شاذان، عن محمد بن علي، عن سعدان بن مسلم، عن أبي بصير قال: قلت له: ألهذا الامر أمد نريح إليه أبداننا وننتهي إليه؟ قال: بلى، ولكنكم أذعتم فزاد الله فيه.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 416 - It is narrated from Fadhl bin Shazan from Muhammad bin Ali from Sadan bin Muslim from Abu Basir that he asked the Imam (a.s): “Is there a fixed time for reappearance; so that we can sit quietly till that time?” He replied: “It was fixed; but you people publicized it and it was postponed.”
